aboutBody:
IRHS Associates - Influer Ressource Humaine Solutions - is a New Delhi-based HR consulting firm founded in 2016 by Ajaya Kumar Sahoo, a senior HR professional with over 32 years of experience across Power, Infrastructure, Automotive, and Tyre industries in India and abroad.

Ajay brings a rare combination of corporate depth and strategic breadth - having served as Global HR Head for the Zenises Group across UAE, South Africa, and Europe, and as General Manager (HR) at Lanco Infratech and Senior Manager (HR) at NTPC, India's largest power company.

iRH offers two core service lines: end-to-end HR Consulting covering People Management, Talent Acquisition, and HR Compliance - and Class to Corporate (C2C), a structured 40-hour soft skills programme designed to make fresh campus recruits productive from day one.
hrConsultingDesc: End-to-end HR solutions tailored to your organisation - from strategy and policy to compliance and talent management.
c2cDesc: A structured 40-hour soft skills programme that makes fresh campus recruits corporate-ready from day one — with individual assessment and a customised recommendation report.
